questions.q: The Telugu actor Chiranjeevi is best known by which honorific title?
questions.explanation: Chiranjeevi is popularly known as the Megastar of Telugu cinema.

questions.q: In which year was the Telugu actor Chiranjeevi born?
questions.explanation: Chiranjeevi was born on 22 August 1955 in Mogalthur, Andhra Pradesh.

questions.q: In which language film industry did Chiranjeevi build his career as a leading star?
questions.explanation: Chiranjeevi rose to fame as the foremost star of Telugu cinema.

questions.q: Apart from action, which performance skill is Chiranjeevi especially celebrated for in his films?
questions.explanation: Chiranjeevi became renowned for his energetic dance-driven hits in the 1980s and 1990s.

questions.q: Which civilian honour was conferred on the Telugu Megastar Chiranjeevi by the Government of India in 2006?
questions.explanation: Chiranjeevi received the Padma Bhushan in 2006.

questions.q: Chiranjeevi was honoured with India's highest film award, the Dadasaheb Phalke Award, in which year?
questions.explanation: Chiranjeevi was presented the Dadasaheb Phalke Award in 2024 at the 70th National Film Awards.

questions.q: In 2008, Chiranjeevi founded which political party?
questions.explanation: Chiranjeevi launched the Praja Rajyam Party in 2008.

questions.q: During which decades did Chiranjeevi dominate Telugu cinema as its leading box-office star?
questions.explanation: Chiranjeevi dominated the Telugu industry through the 1980s and 1990s.

questions.q: Which son of Chiranjeevi is also a hugely popular Telugu actor known as 'Mega Power Star'?
questions.explanation: Ram Charan, the son of Chiranjeevi, is a leading Telugu actor nicknamed Mega Power Star.

questions.q: Which of these is a well-known mass-action genre that Chiranjeevi became famous for headlining?
questions.explanation: Chiranjeevi built his stardom on commercial action and dance-driven entertainers.

questions.q: What is the real birth name of the actor known professionally as Chiranjeevi?
questions.explanation: Chiranjeevi was born Konidela Siva Sankara Vara Prasad.

questions.q: Which 1992 Telugu film starring Chiranjeevi, in which his character marries into a wealthy family, became one of his biggest blockbusters?
questions.explanation: Gharana Mogudu (1992) was a major Chiranjeevi blockbuster in which his character marries into a rich household; it is often cited as the first Telugu film to gross over 10 crore.

questions.q: Chiranjeevi's daughter-in-law, married to his son Ram Charan, is which well-known public figure?
questions.explanation: Ram Charan, Chiranjeevi's son, is married to Upasana Konidela (nee Kamineni).

questions.q: After a long break from films, Chiranjeevi made his acting comeback in which 2017 Telugu action film, a remake of the Tamil hit Kaththi?
questions.explanation: Chiranjeevi returned to acting with Khaidi No. 150 (2017), a remake of the Tamil film Kaththi.

questions.q: In the 2019 epic 'Sye Raa Narasimha Reddy', Chiranjeevi portrayed a real-life freedom fighter from which region?
questions.explanation: Chiranjeevi played Uyyalawada Narasimha Reddy, a rebel from the Rayalaseema region, in Sye Raa Narasimha Reddy (2019).

questions.q: Which 1990 Telugu fantasy film starring Chiranjeevi, noted for its lavish special effects, was among the most expensive Telugu films of its time?
questions.explanation: Jagadeka Veerudu Athiloka Sundari (1990), with its elaborate special effects, was among the costliest Telugu films of its time.

questions.q: In which 1992 Hindi action film, co-starring Meenakshi Seshadri, did Chiranjeevi appear as part of his Bollywood work?
questions.explanation: Chiranjeevi starred in the Hindi film Aaj Ka Goonda Raj (1992) opposite Meenakshi Seshadri.

questions.q: Chiranjeevi merged his Praja Rajyam Party with which national party in 2011?
questions.explanation: Chiranjeevi merged the Praja Rajyam Party with the Indian National Congress in 2011.

questions.q: Chiranjeevi served as a Union Minister of State in the Government of India holding which portfolio?
questions.explanation: Chiranjeevi served as the Union Minister of State (Independent Charge) for Tourism.

questions.q: Which Telugu actor, popularly called 'Power Star' and brother of Chiranjeevi, founded the Jana Sena Party?
questions.explanation: Pawan Kalyan, Chiranjeevi's younger brother, founded the Jana Sena Party.

questions.q: Which 2022 Telugu film, a remake of the Malayalam hit Lucifer, starred Chiranjeevi in the lead role?
questions.explanation: Godfather (2022) was Chiranjeevi's Telugu remake of the Malayalam film Lucifer.

questions.q: Chiranjeevi is associated with founding which charitable trust well known for running a blood bank and eye bank in Hyderabad?
questions.explanation: Chiranjeevi established the Chiranjeevi Charitable Trust, which runs a well-known blood bank and eye bank in Hyderabad.

questions.q: Which 1978 Telugu film was the first film featuring Chiranjeevi to be released, marking his screen debut for audiences?
questions.explanation: Pranam Khareedu, released in September 1978, was the first Chiranjeevi film to reach theatres, making it his screen debut for audiences.

questions.q: Which 1983 Telugu film, in which Chiranjeevi played an escaped convict seeking justice, is widely credited as a major breakthrough that established him as a top star?
questions.explanation: Khaidi (1983), directed by A. Kodandarami Reddy, was the breakthrough action hit that cemented Chiranjeevi's stardom.

questions.q: Which 1988 Telugu film directed by K. Balachander starred Chiranjeevi and won the National Film Award for Best Feature Film on National Integration?
questions.explanation: Rudraveena (1988), directed by K. Balachander, starred Chiranjeevi and won the National Film Award for Best Feature Film on National Integration (the Nargis Dutt Award).

questions.q: The 1990 film 'Pratibandh', one of Chiranjeevi's Hindi films, was a remake of which of his own Telugu hits?
questions.explanation: Pratibandh (1990) was the Hindi remake of Chiranjeevi's Telugu film Ankusham.

questions.q: Which music director duo composed the songs for many of Chiranjeevi's biggest hits, including 'Gharana Mogudu' (1992)?
options: M. M. Keeravani and Devi Sri Prasad
questions.explanation: The composer duo Raj-Koti scored many of Chiranjeevi's hits, including Gharana Mogudu (1992).

questions.q: In which 1987 Telugu film, directed by K. Viswanath, did Chiranjeevi play a self-made cobbler who rises through hard work, in a role acclaimed for its dramatic depth?
questions.explanation: Swayamkrushi (1987), directed by K. Viswanath, featured Chiranjeevi as Sambayya, an illiterate cobbler who rises from poverty through hard work, and is celebrated for his dramatic performance.

questions.q: Chiranjeevi entered the Andhra Pradesh Legislative Assembly in 2009 by winning election from which constituency?
options: Tirupati and Palakollu (won one, lost the other)
questions.explanation: In the 2009 Andhra Pradesh elections Chiranjeevi contested two seats, winning from Tirupati while losing in Palakollu.

questions.q: Which 2023 Telugu film paired Chiranjeevi with director Bobby Kolli and featured an appearance by Ravi Teja in a major box-office success?
questions.explanation: Waltair Veerayya (2023), directed by Bobby Kolli, was a major Chiranjeevi success featuring Ravi Teja in a key role.
